publications.title: The state of AI in 2025: Agents, innovation, and transformation
publications.summary: McKinsey QuantumBlack’s annual State of AI report surveys AI adoption, agents, innovation and organizational transformation, providing the consultancy’s evidence base for enterprise AI strategy.

publications.title: The state of AI: How organizations are rewiring to capture value (PDF)
publications.summary: McKinsey/QuantumBlack’s State of AI report links CEO oversight of AI governance with higher reported bottom-line impact.

publications.title: Seizing the agentic AI advantage (PDF)
publications.summary: McKinsey/QuantumBlack argues agentic AI requires new architectures and governance mechanisms to manage autonomous workflows at enterprise scale.
